textPlain: Do we need 6 front page topics on Gemini? (Plus 2-3 on Antigravity)

The amount of capital that rests on releases like these is insane. The incentive is just too high to not manipulate places like HN, which have a surprising amount of sway with tech industry sentiment.Edit: Check out how my claim against astroturfing did, one of the first comments posted on the primary release blog: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=45967999#45968295. Could always be over-eager Google employees, or maybe the tech community really is this excited for the Gemini 3 release. Seems fishy to me, though...
It's a bit much, but Im having fun riding the hype :) Part of being a geek is getting excited with all the new toys coming out
